Relevant Provision(s) for MEPS: Article 9(1) (non-residential MEPS), Article 9(2) (residential progressive trajectory), Article 17(19) (safeguards), Articles 13, 23–24 (TBS & inspections), Article 10 (solar), Article 15 (SRI).
Articles 25–26: comprehensive heating/cooling assessments; efficient district heating & cooling; local heat planning (>45k inhabitants).
Articles 23–24: annual RES increase in H&C and DHC (links to enabling framework for worst-performers).
National transposition of EPBD Art. 17(15) (ban on public incentives for new stand-alone fossil-fuel boilers) — interaction with MEPS triggers and safeguards.
